summary: Tested 3 fixes: 1) SocialComposer mobile responsive - PASS (mobile tabs Comptes/Contenu working, preview hidden on mobile), 2) Upload image fix - PASS (9/9 tests passed, Cloudinary URLs returned correctly), 3) Multilink module - PASS (21/21 tests passed, public page renders with theme_colors)
seed_data_creation: Existing test page 'Alpha Agency' with slug 'alpha' used for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 fixes verified working: 1) SocialComposer mobile responsive with tabs (Comptes/Contenu) and hidden preview panel on mobile viewport. 2) Image upload returns Cloudinary URLs (not blob URLs), fetch body read only once. 3) Multilink public page at /lien-bio/{slug} renders correctly with theme_colors.

SocialComposer Mobile Responsive.Mobile tabs (Comptes/Contenu): PASS - Tabs visible on mobile viewport (md:hidden)
SocialComposer Mobile Responsive.Preview panel hidden on mobile: PASS - Preview panel has 'hidden lg:flex' class
SocialComposer Mobile Responsive.Tab switching: PASS - Clicking tabs switches between accounts and content views
SocialComposer Mobile Responsive.Desktop 3-panel layout: PASS - Entity/Accounts, Content, Preview panels visible

Image Upload Fix.No blob URLs: PASS - No blob:// URLs in response

Multilink Module.Links displayed: PASS - Instagram and Site Web links visible
